payload.hypothesis: Try a small 4-layer GNN predecoder with gated MLP messages and hard-flip outputs to replace the ineffective compact neural-BP probe.
payload.rationale: The prior branch exp/20260424-155219/01-try-a-compact-neural-bp-predecoder-that- landed at delta_vs_baseline 0.0 with only 9 params, so scaling that exact direction looks low-yield; switching family is the better next probe. The observed wall-clock was ~5s for a trivial model, so a modest 4-layer GNN should remain comfortably feasible while testing a qualitatively different inductive bias.
